title: Internal Audit Evidence and Retention Policy
summary: Internal policy defining requirements for audit evidence collection, storage, and retention for regulatory calculations and reporting systems. Ensures auditability and regulatory compliance.

key_requirements.title: Calculation traceability
key_requirements.description: Every RWA calculation must be fully traceable with input data, parameters, and intermediate results

key_requirements.title: Evidence retention
key_requirements.description: Audit evidence must be retained for minimum 7 years in immutable storage

key_requirements.title: Access logging
key_requirements.description: All access to calculation systems and data must be logged with user identity and timestamp

key_requirements.title: Change logging
key_requirements.description: All configuration and rule changes must be logged with before/after values

key_requirements.title: Report package
key_requirements.description: Each regulatory report submission must include supporting evidence package

engineering_implications.description: Implement comprehensive audit logging with immutable storage
Generate detailed calculation traces for every RWA computation
Design data model to support audit trail and evidence retention
Generate evidence packages automatically with each report
